---
title: PanglaoDB
alias: &ALIAS panglaodb
href: https://panglaodb.se/
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

PanglaoDB is a database of single-cell RNA sequencing experiments from human and mouse, enabling cell type annotation and integration with canonical cell type marker genes.

## Key Features

- Aggregates hundreds of scRNA-seq datasets from human and mouse across diverse tissues
- Provides a curated database of cell type marker genes for automated annotation workflows
- Offers cell type signature scores and gene-to-cell-type mappings for rapid annotation
- Supports browsable metadata including tissue, species, and sequencing platform
- Free and openly accessible with bulk download capabilities

## Use Cases in Research

- Annotating cell clusters in novel scRNA-seq experiments using canonical marker genes
- Compiling reference marker gene sets for immune and epithelial cell types relevant to infection
- Benchmarking automated cell type annotation tools against curated PanglaoDB signatures
- Identifying tissue-specific expression contexts for putative AMR-related genes
- Integrating marker databases into AI-driven cell type prediction pipelines

## Getting Started

Visit [PanglaoDB](https://panglaodb.se/) to access the database.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
